ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
not(isnew())&& $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps Extended"&& $Profile.Name <> "SW SalesOps"&& $Profile.Name <> "System Administrator"&& RecordType.Name ="Partnership"&&
(ISCHANGED(StageName) && ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Prospect")|| ISPICKVAL(StageName,"Prospect")) && (ISBLANK(SW_Industry__c)|| ISPICKVAL(Primary_Solution__c ,"") || ISBLANK(of_Customers__c ))&&
NOT(ISCHANGED( Owner_s_Manager__c ))&& NOT(ISNEW())&& NOT(ISCHANGED(Account_owner_changed__c))&& NOT (Account_owner_changed__c) = FALSE && NOT(ISCHANGED(Opportunity_Division__c))&& NOT(ISPICKVAL(Opportunity_Division__c,""))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Mandatory fields at Prospect stage: SW Industry, Primary Solution, # of Customers
